name: Brown Paper Sack Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Peel and slice apples; set aside.
3. Mix pie crust ingredients gently. Divide in half.
4. Roll out half between two pieces of waxed paper; place in bottom of pie pan and make fluted edge. Prebake about 7 minutes.
5. Mix sugar, flour, nutmeg, and cinnamon together.
6. Place apples in pie crust; sprinkle spices over top and gently shake to sift through.
7. Roll out second half of pie crust between waxed paper; place on top of apples. Tuck inside fluted edges.
8. Mix together topping ingredients; spoon over top crust and spread over entire top crust.
9. Place pie inside large brown paper grocery bag. Place bag on large cookie sheet.
10. Fold opening of grocery bag under and tuck. Bake for 1 hour.
